title: [cross-impl] IID derivation inconsistency Python/C vs Rust
description: Python (identity.py) and C (lichen_link_rx.c using SHA256(pubkey)[:8] + U/L clear) produce different link-local IID from same pubkey than Rust (identity.rs using custom double FNV-1a hash_32 with distinguisher bytes). Violates cross-impl consistency requirement and test vectors for addressing (spec/06-addressing.md, identity test vectors). Same input (pubkey) yields different behavior across impls. Harmonize to canonical SHA256 approach per RFC4291 and update all tests/vectors. Discovered during crossimpl review of recent bd/worker merges.
